---
title: "`r params$report_title`"
date: "`r format(Sys.Date(), '%B %d, %Y')`"
output: pdf_document
params:
  report_title: NA
  length_summary: NA
  error_plot: NA
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

### Part I Summary
`r params$length_summary`

### Part I Error Plot
```{r, echo=FALSE, fig.width=8, fig.height=3.75, fig.align='center', out.width="80%"}
# This renders the plot at 8 inches wide and 5 inches tall
if (!is.null(params$error_plot)) {
  params$error_plot
}

### Part II Summary
